Senior React Developer

Acme Corp
🇨🇴 Colombia
Published: January 15, 2024
Remote
Senior
USD 5,000 - 7,000 / month

We are looking for a Senior React Developer to join our engineering team. You will work on building modern web applications using React, TypeScript, and GraphQL.

Requirements: 5+ years of experience with React, strong TypeScript skills, experience with GraphQL APIs, and familiarity with CI/CD pipelines.
